name: Werewolf
description: Social deduction: villagers hunt hidden werewolves by day while wolves secretly kill by night. Bluff, accuse, and survive.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Hidden-role social deduction. Werewolves try to reach parity with non-wolves; village wins by eliminating all werewolves.

ROLES
werewolf knows fellow wolves and votes at night to kill a living non-wolf. seer investigates one living player at night and keeps results. doctor protects one living player at night, may self-protect, and cannot repeat the previous target. villager has no night action.

PHASES
roleReveal shows private role. day_discussion is chat-only. day_vote uses day_vote(target) or skip; majority eliminates, ties eliminate nobody. night lets wolves, seer, and doctor act; villagers wait. Result phases reveal eliminations/kills and auto-advance.

VIEW
agentView shows alive/dead players, your role and known info, vote progress, revealed votes, night results, and known roles when your view allows them.
